Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"employee":{"id":1,"details":{"forename":"Jens","location":{"language":"German"}},"hobbies":[{"__typename":"Exercise"},{"__typename":"Gaming"},{"__typename":"Other"},{"__typename":"Programming"},{"__typename":"Travelling"}]},"teammates":[{"id":4,"details":{"forename":"Björn"},"products":["FINANCE","HUMAN_RESOURCES","MARKETING"]},{"id":11,"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"},"products":["FINANCE"]}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
